name_en: 🔥🔥🔥【Full Counter Packaging Configuration】 The Generation Gucci collection delves into the brand's heritage elements, fusing designs from different eras into a single aesthetic narrative. The exquisite tote offers a refined silhouette, with straps forming the top handle and shoulder strap for versatile wear, perfectly blending iconic details with daily convenience.
name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥【Full Counter Packaging Configuration】 The Generation Gucci collection delves into the brand's heritage elements, fusing designs from different eras into a single aesthetic narrative. The exquisite tote offers a refined silhouette, with straps forming the top handle and shoulder strap for versatile wear, perfectly blending iconic details with daily convenience.
Beige and dark brown GG canvas
Dark brown leather details, interior featuring 'Gucci Made in Italy' gold foil stamping
Red and green webbing
Brown canvas lining, featuring Diamante pattern
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Double handles, vertical lengths 15cm and 30cm
Zip closure
Model: 875929.
Dimensions: 36cm (W) x 35cm (H) x 21.5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.85kg
Color: Beige Canvas/Red and Green Webbing.
Made in Italy
